# toll-booth-announce

> Bridge between toll-booth (L402 middleware) and 402-announce (Nostr service discovery)

toll-booth-announce maps your toll-booth configuration to a kind 31402 Nostr event,
automatically announcing your paid API for decentralised discovery. It publishes a signed Nostr
event (kind 31402, the HTTP service descriptor) with multi-transport URLs for censorship resistance.

## When to Use

Use toll-booth-announce when you have a toll-booth-powered API and want AI agents
and clients to discover it on Nostr relays.

## Install

npm install toll-booth-announce

**Peer dependency:** Requires @forgesworn/toll-booth (the L402 middleware) alongside this package.

## Quick Start

import { announce } from 'toll-booth-announce'
const handle = await announce(boothConfig, { secretKey, relays, urls, about })

## Auto-Derived Fields

- name: from serviceName or 'toll-booth'
- identifier: slugified from name
- pricing: extracted from booth pricing config
- paymentMethods: from backend (Lightning) and xcashu config

## Related

- toll-booth: L402/xcashu payment middleware
- 402-announce: Low-level Nostr announcement library
- 402-mcp: MCP server for AI agent discovery and payment
